plan.summary: Comment out the two showToast() calls in validateAndSetBoatPosition() that notify the user when the boat is snapped to water or when no water is found. The code stays intact for future use, but the toasts stop firing. This is a one-line-each change in the JS stored in _temp_build.

steps.description: Comment out the two showToast() calls on lines 284 and 294 of the sailing JS (in validateAndSetBoatPosition function) — the 'No water nearby' toast and the 'Moved to nearest water' toast. Keep the rest of the logic (position unchanged, snap, pulse animation) working as before.
Run tests and check_export_types to verify nothing is broken.
